message:
feat(ft-xbnl0.2.3): cx-first timeout wrapping scheduler shutdown wait (tick 296)

Migrates the periodic-scheduler shutdown wait in `scheduler_body`
(snapshot_engine.rs L943) to use `timeout_with_cx` instead of ambient
`timeout`:

- `timeout(interval, shutdown_fut)` →
  `timeout_with_cx(cx, interval, shutdown_fut)`

where `shutdown_fut = shutdown.changed(cx)` is already cx-aware.

Before this tick, the inner `shutdown.changed(cx)` future honored cx
cancel, but the outer `timeout` wrapper was ambient. Effectively cancel
propagated through the inner future, but the outer timeout itself
was not gated on cx.

Now both layers are cx-first:
- Outer `timeout_with_cx` gates the wait budget on `cx.checkpoint()`
- Inner `shutdown.changed(cx)` gates the watch-channel wait on cx

This makes the snapshot engine periodic scheduler strictly cx-cancel
responsive at every await boundary within the interval wait.

Verification: `cargo check -p frankenterm --bin ft` compiles clean.

Cumulative ft-xbnl0.2.3 ticks this session: 110 (187-296).
frankenterm-core internal sites: 56 (prior 55 + snapshot_engine 1).
main.rs cross-crate total: 192 sites (unchanged this tick).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
